      • checkTakeProfit(rule: TakeProfitRule; state: PositionState; indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): tuple[ triggered: bool, exitPercent: float]

Types

ATRBasedStopLoss = ref object of StopLossRule
  atrMultiplier*: float
  atrIndicatorId*: string
Stop loss based on ATR volatility 
FixedPercentageStopLoss = ref object of StopLossRule
  percentage*: float
Stop loss at fixed % below entry 
FixedPercentageTakeProfit = ref object of TakeProfitRule
  percentage*: float
Take profit at fixed % gain 
FixedPriceStopLoss = ref object of StopLossRule
  price*: float
Stop loss at absolute price level 
FixedPriceTakeProfit = ref object of TakeProfitRule
  price*: float
Take profit at absolute price level 
MultiLevelTakeProfit = ref object of TakeProfitRule
  levels*: seq[TakeProfitLevel]
Multiple take profit levels 
PositionState = object
  entryPrice*: float
  highestPrice*: float
  currentPrice*: float
  levelsHit*: seq[bool]
State tracking for a position (needed for trailing stops) 
RiskManagementError = object of CatchableError
Error in risk management 
RiskRewardTakeProfit = ref object of TakeProfitRule
  ratio*: float
  stopLossRule*: StopLossRule
Take profit based on risk/reward ratio 
StopLossKind = enum
  slkNone, slkFixedPercentage, slkFixedPrice, slkTrailing, slkATRBased
Type of stop loss rule 
StopLossRule = ref object of RootObj
  kind*: StopLossKind
Base stop loss rule 
TakeProfitKind = enum
  tpkNone, tpkFixedPercentage, tpkFixedPrice, tpkRiskReward, tpkMultiLevel
Type of take profit rule 
TakeProfitLevel = object
  percentage*: float
  exitPercent*: float
Single take profit level for partial exits 
TakeProfitRule = ref object of RootObj
  kind*: TakeProfitKind
Base take profit rule 
TrailingStopLoss = ref object of StopLossRule
  trailPercentage*: float
  activationProfit*: float
Trailing stop that moves with profit

Procs

proc calculateStopPrice(rule: StopLossRule; entryPrice: float; indicators: Table[
    string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): Option[float] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate the actual stop price level Returns none if stop price cannot be determined 
proc calculateTakeProfitPrice(rule: TakeProfitRule; entryPrice: float;
    indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): Option[float] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate the actual take profit price level For multi-level, returns first level Returns none if price cannot be determined 
proc markLevelHit(state: var PositionState; levelIndex: int) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Mark a take profit level as hit 
proc newATRBasedStopLoss(atrMultiplier: float; atrIndicatorId: string = "atr_14"): ATRBasedStopLoss {.
    ...raises: [RiskManagementError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create ATR-based stop loss Stop distance = ATR * atrMultiplier below entry price 
proc newFixedPercentageStopLoss(percentage: float): FixedPercentageStopLoss {.
    ...raises: [RiskManagementError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create fixed percentage stop loss percentage: % loss to trigger stop (e.g., 5.0 = exit at 5% loss) 
proc newFixedPercentageTakeProfit(percentage: float): FixedPercentageTakeProfit {.
    ...raises: [RiskManagementError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create fixed percentage take profit 
proc newFixedPriceStopLoss(price: float): FixedPriceStopLoss {.
    ...raises: [RiskManagementError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create fixed price stop loss 
proc newFixedPriceTakeProfit(price: float): FixedPriceTakeProfit {.
    ...raises: [RiskManagementError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create fixed price take profit 
proc newMultiLevelTakeProfit(levels: seq[TakeProfitLevel]): MultiLevelTakeProfit {.
    ...raises: [RiskManagementError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create multi-level take profit 
proc newNoStopLoss(): StopLossRule {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a rule with no stop loss 
proc newNoTakeProfit(): TakeProfitRule {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a rule with no take profit 
proc newPositionState(entryPrice: float): PositionState {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Create new position state 
proc newRiskRewardTakeProfit(ratio: float; stopLossRule: StopLossRule): RiskRewardTakeProfit {.
    ...raises: [RiskManagementError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create risk/reward ratio take profit Profit target = stop loss distance * ratio 
proc newTrailingStopLoss(trailPercentage: float; activationProfit: float = 0.0): TrailingStopLoss {.
    ...raises: [RiskManagementError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create trailing stop loss trailPercentage: Distance to trail behind highest price (%) activationProfit: Profit % before trailing starts (0 = trail immediately) 
proc updateState(state: var PositionState; currentPrice: float) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Update position state with new price

Methods

method checkStopLoss(rule: ATRBasedStopLoss; state: PositionState; indicators: Table[
    string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): bool {....raises: [KeyError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check ATR-based stop loss 
method checkStopLoss(rule: FixedPercentageStopLoss; state: PositionState;
    indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): bool {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check fixed percentage stop loss 
method checkStopLoss(rule: FixedPriceStopLoss; state: PositionState; indicators: Table[
    string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check fixed price stop loss 
method checkStopLoss(rule: StopLossRule; state: PositionState; indicators: Table[
    string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): bool {.base, ...raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if stop loss has been triggered Returns true if position should be exited Base method - must be overridden 
method checkStopLoss(rule: TrailingStopLoss; state: PositionState; indicators: Table[
    string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check trailing stop loss Only activates after minimum profit is reached 
method checkTakeProfit(rule: FixedPercentageTakeProfit; state: PositionState;
    indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): tuple[
    triggered: bool, exitPercent: float] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check fixed percentage take profit 
method checkTakeProfit(rule: FixedPriceTakeProfit; state: PositionState;
    indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): tuple[
    triggered: bool, exitPercent: float] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check fixed price take profit 
method checkTakeProfit(rule: MultiLevelTakeProfit; state: PositionState;
    indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): tuple[
    triggered: bool, exitPercent: float] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check multi-level take profit Returns first unhit level that has been reached 
method checkTakeProfit(rule: RiskRewardTakeProfit; state: PositionState;
    indicators: Table[string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): tuple[
    triggered: bool, exitPercent: float] {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check risk/reward ratio take profit Calculate profit target based on stop loss distance 
method checkTakeProfit(rule: TakeProfitRule; state: PositionState; indicators: Table[
    string, float] = initTable[string, float]()): tuple[triggered: bool,
    exitPercent: float] {.base, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if take profit has been triggered Returns (triggered, exitPercent) where exitPercent is % of position to exit Base method - must be overridden

Made with Nim. Generated: 2026-02-02 03:41:50 UTC
